events.agenda: Inaugural Buenos Aires dbt Meetup covering dbt product updates, optimizing incremental dbt-postgres models on 500GB+ tables, and how dbt materializations work under the hood.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader data engineering, architecture, and modeling topics.
events.event_name: Primera dbt Meetup en Buenos Aires
events.location: Mutt Data, Av. Sta. Fe 1752 PB B, Buenos Aires
events.raw_text:
Thu, Dec 12, 2024, 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM ART

Mutt Data, Buenos Aires

Primera dbt Meetup en Buenos Aires

Agenda:
18:45 - ¿Qué hay de nuevo en el mundo de dbt? (Victoria Perez Mola, dbt Labs)
19:00 - Charla #1: Como optimizamos modelos incrementales de dbt-postgres sobre tablas de 500GB+
19:30 - Charla #2: Materializaciones: Lo que está bajo el capó de dbt

Charla #1: Optimizing incremental dbt-postgres models over 500GB+ tables, helping Postgres' query planner avoid scanning entire historical tables. By Gonzalo Villafañe, Data Engineer, Mutt Data.

Charla #2: How dbt materializations work under the hood, covering efficient historical reprocessing and custom materializations for performance and flexibility. By Lucas Trubiano, Data Engineer, ITTI.

talks.description: Overview of dbt's latest product developments.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 18:45 - 19:00 | ¿Qué hay de nuevo en el mundo de dbt? (Victoria Perez Mola, dbt Labs)
talks.title: ¿Qué hay de nuevo en el mundo de dbt?

talks.description: Techniques for optimizing incremental dbt-postgres models over 500GB+ tables, helping the Postgres query planner avoid scanning full historical data.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Charla #1: Como optimizamos modelos incrementales de dbt-postgres sobre tablas de 500GB+. Speaker bio: Gonzalo Villafañe, Data Engineer de Mutt Data
talks.title: Como optimizamos modelos incrementales de dbt-postgres sobre tablas de 500GB+

talks.description: A deep dive into how dbt materializations work under the hood, covering efficient historical reprocessing and custom materializations for better performance and flexibility.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Charla #2: Materializaciones: Lo que está bajo el capó de dbt. Speaker bio: Lucas Trubiano, Data Engineer del equipo Analytics Engineering en ITTI
talks.speaker_title: Data Engineer, Analytics Engineering team, ITTI
talks.title: Materializaciones: Lo que está bajo el capó de dbt
